case_title: OSORIO, GREGORY DBA OSORIO INSURANCE AGENCY VS SALESFORCE.COM/FOUNDATION

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSORIO, GREGORY DBA OSORIO INSURANCE AGENCY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SALESFORCE.COM/FOUNDATION THE COURT ORDERS CANCELLATION OF THE SUBJECT CONTRACT SUCH THAT NEITHER PARTY OWES THE OTHER PARTY ANY FURTHER OBLIGATION OR PERFORMANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO ROBERT A. WEXLEY AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS-SALESFORCE. COM/FOUNDATION-DEFENDANT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,925.00 FILED BY OSORIO, GREGORY DBA OSORIO INSURANCE AGENCY AS TO DEFENDANT SALESFORCE.COM/FOUNDATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
